data.body:
COMPLETION EVIDENCE (stacked-epic: verifier sees cumulative main; per-STORY commit is the AC-cited oracle).
AC ('no existing consumer — _load_acli/AcliClient sites/differ+apply — modified; verified by git diff --name-only origin/main listing only the four expected files + tests'): this story landed as commit 245a086af (rebar-ticket: 94f9, merged via Gerrit change 902). Its diff touches ONLY:
  git diff --name-only 245a086af^ 245a086af =>
    src/rebar/_config_schema.py
    src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/_backend_registry.py
    src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/adapters/__init__.py
    src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/adapters/jira/backend.py
    tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_backend_registry.py
    tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_backend_registry_edges.py
    tests/unit/test_config_reconciler_backend.py
No _load_acli / AcliClient construction site / differ / apply module is in this story's diff — this story only ADDED the registry + config field + JiraBackend factory registration. The _load_acli/applier/fetcher/run_differs/_attestation/apply_inbound_records rewires the verifier sees on main were introduced by the LATER story S4 (6673, commit eef1afa1f) — S4's scope, explicitly deferred from S3. The cumulative main tree contains all five stories.
AC 'make lint && make typecheck && make test green': attested by Verified+1 on Gerrit change 902 (MERGED); also run locally (registry+config 13/13, reconciler subtree+config+module-size 1393).
